parameters.subject: IDS BCBSA_FEP_MBR_ENR Balalncing Abort
parameters.body:
The IDS BCBSA_FEP_MBR_ENR cannot run while there is another process listed on the P_RUN_CYC as running.   This job is being halted.

SOURCE:           BCBSA
SUBJECT:          BCBSA_FEP_MBR_ENR
TARGET:           IDS
FREQUENCY:    MONTHLY
See Attached file for Balancing Errors
